title: Social Placement Surface
description: Declared social-placement surface classification for social inventory, distinguishing the in-app surface where a social placement renders. Values name the semantic surface, not platform brands. This is seller-declared discovery metadata, not independent verification of inventory quality or delivery context.

enumDescriptions.feed: The primary scrolling home or timeline surface where posts and ads are interleaved with followed and recommended content.
enumDescriptions.stories: The full-screen, ephemeral tap-through surface presented between or alongside users' story content.
enumDescriptions.short_video: The full-screen, sound-on, swipe-past, algorithmically-recommended vertical short-video surface. Subsumes the platform brand names for this surface (Reels, Shorts, Spotlight, and TikTok's For You short-video experience) — platform identity belongs to a property/publisher axis, not here.
enumDescriptions.explore: The discovery or browse surface presenting recommended content outside the user's followed graph.
enumDescriptions.search: The in-app search-results surface, keyed to the user's query.
